results.name: git diff --stat

Current-work Phase 2 artifacts on disk under docs/supercode/20260507-phase2-artifact-state-b4c8/ are gitignored per .gitignore 'docs/' rule.

results.name: Phase 3/4 artifact exclusion check
results.summary: No mailbox, ownership registry, per-worker worktree, embedded MCP, hierarchical AGENTS.md, wiki, ultragoal, or new public stage added. Phase 3/4 terms appear only in non-goal/exclusion/negative contexts: execute/SKILL.md Non-Goals section, contract test negative assertions, and evidence.md adoption note.

results.name: todowrite remains active source
results.summary: todo-sync/SKILL.md explicitly states: 'todowrite remains the active in-session todo source and primary task tracking mechanism. state.json is a durable snapshot/complement, not a replacement.' Contract test confirms todowrite active-source semantics.

results.name: helper pure — no FS I/O
results.summary: workflow-artifacts.ts imports only zod. Test verifies no node:fs or node:fs/promises imports in helper source. All validators work on in-memory data. Path helpers are pure string builders.

results.name: ledger append-only
results.summary: Skill docs state 'append one JSON object per line; do not rewrite, reorder, or delete historical lines during normal workflow progress.' Contract tests verify append-only and no-rewrite language in skill docs.

results.name: worktree/finish docs-only
results.summary: worktree/SKILL.md: 'documentation-only guidance; no new copy, cleanup, migration, or runtime worktree behavior.' finish/SKILL.md: 'documentation-only preservation of artifacts; no new cleanup or copy runtime behavior.' Both confirmed in diff.

results.name: WORK_ID=20260507-phase2-artifact-state-b4c8 bun test src/__tests__/workflow-artifacts-current-work.test.ts
results.summary: Terminal validation after final artifact write passed: 8 pass, 0 fail, 26 expect() calls. This validation ran after the T08 record update and is the terminal handoff evidence.

executor_evidence: T08 scope review complete. All changes limited to: (1) 8 skill markdown docs with Phase 2 artifact lifecycle instructions, (2) pure helper module at src/hooks/workflow-artifacts.ts with Zod schemas and no FS I/O, (3) 3 test files with permanent fixture-based tests and opt-in current-work validation, (4) current-work Phase 2 artifacts under docs/supercode/20260507-phase2-artifact-state-b4c8/. No Phase 3/4 features introduced. No new public workflow stage. todowrite remains active todo source. Ledger guidance is append-only. Worktree/finish changes are documentation-only. state.json completed_tasks use verification_record_status to distinguish pre-adoption from verified tasks. Terminal current-work validation ran after final artifact write: 8 pass, 0 fail.

diagnostics_status.summary: TypeScript typecheck clean; bun test 720 pass/0 fail; no blocking diagnostics
